frontmatter.title: Two guarded recursive powerdomains for applicative simulation
frontmatter.meta: @inproceedings{mogelberg-vezzosi-2021, author = {M{\o{}}gelberg, {Rasmus Ejlers} and Vezzosi, Andrea}, publisher = {Electronic Proceedings in Theoretical Computer Science}, booktitle = {Proceedings 37th Conference on Mathematical Foundations of Programming Semantics}, date = {2021-12}, doi = {10.4204/EPTCS.351.13}, pages = {200--217}, title = {Two Guarded Recursive Powerdomains for Applicative Simulation}, volume = {351}, }
Proceedings 37th Conference on Mathematical Foundations of Programming Semantics
